justification: QA validation returned PASS with all 27 tests passing (25 T10-specific + 2 scaffold imports). All acceptance criteria from the initial spec have been met. Scope boundaries strictly respected with no signal-selection pipeline, backtest logic, execution orchestration, or StrategyContext expansion.
notes: T10 represents a well-isolated feature addition to the strategy framework. The chip-flow strategy module successfully extends the quantitative trading system without creating dependencies on unimplemented features.
